metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore advanced media design including UX/UI principles, branding strategies, and interactive media creation. This course integrates design thinking with digital technologies to create engaging user experiences and multimedia solutions.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in advanced media design, UX/UI principles, branding, and interactive media.

big_ideas.statement: User experience (UX) design focuses on understanding user needs and creating intuitive, accessible interactions with digital products.
big_ideas.elaboration: Human-centered design approaches that prioritize usability and accessibility create more effective and satisfying user experiences.

big_ideas.statement: Interactive design engages users through responsive feedback, navigation, and engagement mechanisms that guide user behaviour.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding interaction patterns and user psychology enables design of intuitive and engaging digital experiences.

big_ideas.statement: Branding creates emotional connections and differentiation through consistent visual and experiential identity across touchpoints.
big_ideas.elaboration: Comprehensive branding strategy unifies visual identity, messaging, and user experience to create memorable brand recognition.

big_ideas.statement: Media design integrates multiple design disciplines—visual, interaction, information, and motion—to create cohesive multimedia experiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Mastery of diverse design skills and technologies enables creation of sophisticated, multi-layered digital experiences.

competencies.raw: Design user-centred experiences for digital products and services
i_can_statements: I can conduct user research and persona development
I can create user journeys and experience maps
I can design information architecture and navigation
I can create wireframes and prototypes

competencies.raw: Design interactive interfaces and user experiences
i_can_statements: I can design user interface layouts and components
I can design interaction patterns and animations
I can design for different devices and screen sizes
I can apply usability principles and accessibility standards

competencies.raw: Develop comprehensive brand identity and experience strategies
i_can_statements: I can develop brand positioning and messaging
I can design brand guidelines and visual systems
I can create branded experiences across touchpoints
I can design brand identity for digital platforms

competencies.raw: Evaluate user experience and design effectiveness
i_can_statements: I can conduct usability testing and gather feedback
I can analyze user behaviour and interaction patterns
I can evaluate accessibility and inclusivity
I can make data-informed design improvements

competencies.raw: Create interactive prototypes and high-fidelity mockups
i_can_statements: I can create wireframes and mockups
I can build interactive prototypes
I can create design specifications and handoff documentation
I can test and iterate prototypes

competencies.raw: Design visual communication across media formats
i_can_statements: I can create graphics for digital and print applications
I can design video and animation content
I can create infographics and data visualizations
I can produce multimedia assets and components
I can create logo and brand identity systems
I can design branded websites and applications
I can create branded marketing collateral
I can maintain brand consistency across channels

competencies.raw: Produce motion design and interactive content
i_can_statements: I can create animations and motion graphics
I can produce interactive multimedia experiences
I can design transitions and micro-interactions
I can create video and animated content

competencies.raw: Use UX/UI design tools and prototyping software
i_can_statements: I can use design tools like Figma, Adobe XD, or Sketch
I can use prototyping tools to test interactions
I can create design systems and component libraries
I can collaborate on design files with teams

competencies.raw: Apply motion design and animation technologies
i_can_statements: I can use animation and motion design tools
I can create CSS animations and transitions
I can use video and animation software
I can understand animation principles and techniques

competencies.raw: Use web and digital design tools and technologies
i_can_statements: I can understand web technologies and standards
I can use HTML/CSS for web design basics
I can use digital asset management systems
I can optimize designs for different platforms

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging design technologies and platforms
i_can_statements: I can assess new design tools and platforms
I can understand AR/VR and immersive design
I can evaluate voice interface and conversational design
I can identify emerging technologies in media design
